headline: Template now themes off the HDS token spine (#30 / design-system#64): @theme maps --color-* to HDS --semantic-* vars, brandStyle() maps the palette via the @hirobius/design-system/brand overlay bridge, and variables.css supplies defaults — the parallel --brand-* system is gone. All 6 apps build green, each preview keeps its distinct palette, output carries the full HDS spine (119 semantic + 162 primitive vars), pixel-identical. ClientConfig.brand + presets unchanged (no config/schema break). Factory still proven across all 4 presets; engine frozen pending ops cutover; pre-revenue, nothing deployed live.
next: Publish @hirobius/design-system >=0.12.0 (carries /brand + overlay bridge), then `pnpm install` here to regenerate the lockfile against the published version (#30 release gate)
Deploy a preview live + verify the basic-auth gate (#8)
Bake access-tech scroll-reveal motion into the template + brand.motion dial (#22)
Ops first live generate (needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) → then delete engine here (#10)
blocked: #30 lockfile regen waits on the @hirobius/design-system >=0.12.0 npm release (proven locally against a pnpm-pack tarball)
#10 waits on ops's first live generate (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in ops)
Live lead sourcing waits on OUTSCRAPER_API_KEY in ops
